item.title: Another Gaussian approximation 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses approximations of the Gaussian density function exp(-x²) using cosine-based functions. The function (1+cos(x))/2 provides a fair approximation, which can be improved by raising it to a power. A novel approximation (1+cos(sin(x)+x))/2 matches the power series of exp(-x²) up to the x⁴ term, with error on the order of x⁶/240. However, the alternating series theorem does not apply because the series terms do not decrease monotonically for x=4, yet the actual error is much smaller than predicted. The post highlights the nuance of series truncation error bounds.
标签: Gaussian approximation, cosine approximation, power series, alternating series, error analysis, numerical analysis, mathematics, approximation theory

item.title: The solution might be cancelling my AI subscription 摘要
item.description:
David Wilson describes how AI coding agents enable rapid creation of many projects, but this leads to attention fragmentation and abandoned work, calling AI a 'thermonuclear ADHD amplifier.' He suggests curtailing use as the only current management strategy. However, Hacker News comments from ADHD users report opposite effects: AI helps them focus, finish side projects, and maintain productivity. The author hopes discipline is the key skill, but acknowledges it's difficult to develop.
标签: AI, productivity, ADHD, coding agents, attention, project management, AI misuse, focus, side projects, Hacker News

item.title: Be thou not pilled 摘要
item.description:
The essay explores how people become 'pilled'—captured by belief systems that do their thinking for them. Drawing on Charles Mackay, Eric Hoffer, and Orwell, it argues that ideas spread not by truth but by emotional transmissibility. The internet accelerates this, installing worldviews via memes. The author warns against mistaking fluency in a tribe's jargon for understanding, and offers four antidotes: keep respected dissenting company, read strong opposing arguments, watch your vocabulary, and track predictions. True conviction must be held loosely enough to survive being wrong.
标签: belief systems, critical thinking, groupthink, memes, psychology, philosophy, internet culture, epistemology, intellectual humility, media literacy
